sources.description: Tatoeba Japanese sentence export; build-corpus-from-tatoeba extracts Sudachi morphemes plus whole-sentence surfaces (length <= 64) as typing candidates.
sources.notes: Fetched with cleanroom_pipeline fetch-open-corpora; provenance in packages/cleanroom-pipeline/.cache/open_corpora/SOURCE_PROVENANCE.json at build time. wordfreq is not used for lane-B master.

sources.description: JMdict English-gloss XML (EDRDG); downloaded for reference / future integration; not yet merged into master TSV.
sources.notes: Same fetch-open-corpora step as Tatoeba; see SOURCE_PROVENANCE.json.

sources.description: UniDic lite dictionary bundle used by Cutlet/fugashi for surface→romaji.
Surface→romaji (BAS-ish ASCII) for pipeline reading column.
SudachiPy core dictionary for normalized_form in ingest.
Multilingual sentence embeddings for semantic similarity vs Lane-A-derived centroid (local only).

build.tool: fetch-open-corpora + cleanroom_pipeline build-corpus-from-tatoeba + ingest + filter-deck + join-strokes + profile-semantic / score-semantic + export
build.notes: Deck script gates + stroke filter; ranking uses semantic_similarity. Lane A JSON is used only locally for embedding centroid and target lengths (surfaces are not copied into output). Long Tatoeba lines yield koto-shaped surfaces when they pass deck_filters.
